title: SCP-TEST
frozen_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.

scenes.narration: 문이 닫히는 순간, 당신은 이미 늦었습니다. 플랫폼 끝에서 석상이 한 걸음 더 가까워져 있습니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; wide shot: doors seal as the sentinel looms one stride closer at the platform end
shots.narration_beat_text: 플랫폼 문이 닫히고 그 너머에서 석상이 한 발짝 다가와 있습니다.

scenes.narration: 축축한 콘크리트 냄새가 코를 찌릅니다. 당신이 숨을 고르는 사이 감시 화면 속 위치가 또 달라집니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; close-up POV: damp concrete walls of the surveillance booth in stale recycled air
shots.narration_beat_text: 축축한 콘크리트 냄새가 부스 안을 채웁니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; medium shot: surveillance monitor showing the sentinel at a new position between blinks
shots.narration_beat_text: 감시 화면을 다시 확인하니 석상의 위치가 바뀌어 있습니다.

scenes.narration: 재단은 왜 세 명을 붙여뒀을까요. 한 명이라도 눈을 감는 순간 계산이 무너진다는 뜻입니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; overhead shot: three observers locking eyes down a sterile control corridor
shots.narration_beat_text: 복도 끝에서 세 명의 감시자가 동시에 시선을 고정합니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; close-up: one observer's eyelid closing as the other two stiffen in alarm
shots.narration_beat_text: 한 명이 눈을 감자 다른 둘의 자세가 굳어집니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; medium shot: rotation drill — the three keep their breath synced to keep watch unbroken
shots.narration_beat_text: 팀이 무너지지 않으려 호흡을 맞춥니다.

scenes.narration: 근데 여기서 더 이상한 건 그림자입니다. 본체가 멈춘 뒤에도 검은 윤곽이 늦게 따라옵니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; low angle: the sentinel's body comes to a hard stop at the threshold
shots.narration_beat_text: 석상 본체가 격리실 입구에서 멈춥니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; close shadow study: a dark silhouette catches up to the body one beat later
shots.narration_beat_text: 본체보다 한 박자 늦게 검은 그림자가 따라붙습니다.

scenes.narration: 만약 당신이 그 방에 들어간다면 가장 먼저 들리는 건 경보음이 아니라, 발뒤꿈치를 긁는 모래 소리일 겁니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; tracking shot: walker enters the containment walkway, silence pressed in
shots.narration_beat_text: 격리 통로에 발을 들이면 정적부터 무겁게 깔립니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; close-up: grit grinding under heels just behind the walker's back
shots.narration_beat_text: 등 뒤에서 모래가 발뒤꿈치를 긁는 소리만 또렷이 들립니다.

scenes.narration: 이제 정체가 드러납니다. 이 개체는 감시가 끊기는 찰나를 먹고 움직이는, 재단 최악의 시야형 포식자였습니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; archival montage: surveillance footage freezes as the dossier identifies the entity
shots.narration_beat_text: 기록 영상이 멈추고 정체가 화면 위로 떠오릅니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; flicker cut: each blink advances the sentinel one tile closer to camera
shots.narration_beat_text: 감시자가 깜빡이는 찰나마다 석상이 한 칸씩 전진합니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; document close-up: classification stamp 'sight-bound predator' across the dossier
shots.narration_beat_text: 재단 보고서는 이 개체를 시야형 포식자로 분류합니다.

scenes.narration: 솔직히 이 부분은 자료만 봐도 소름 돋습니다. 셔터가 내려온 뒤에도 먼지 자국은 계속 앞으로 이어져 있었거든요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; wide shot: containment shutter slamming down with a deep mechanical roar
shots.narration_beat_text: 봉인된 격리실 셔터가 굉음을 내며 떨어집니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; floor-level shot: dust trail continues forward beyond the sealed shutter line
shots.narration_beat_text: 셔터 너머 바닥에 새겨진 먼지 자국이 더 앞으로 이어져 있습니다.

scenes.narration: 게다가 재단은 아직도 이 그림자가 왜 남는지 모릅니다. 본체보다 늦게 도착하는 어둠, 그게 진짜 핵심일지도 모르죠.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; archive table: case-by-case shadow photographs spread across redacted folders
shots.narration_beat_text: 기록 보관실에서 사례별 그림자 사진이 펼쳐집니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; isolated close-up: a single shadow arriving on the floor seconds after the body has stilled
shots.narration_beat_text: 본체가 정지한 뒤에도 그림자만 한 박자 늦게 도착합니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; analyst's hand pushing the case file aside, conclusion field left blank
shots.narration_beat_text: 재단 분석가는 답을 찾지 못한 채 결론을 보류합니다.

scenes.narration: 그래서 질문이 남습니다. 당신이 마지막 감시자라면, 눈이 타들어 가는 그 순간에도 끝까지 버틸 수 있을까요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; dim wide shot: lone observer slumped against a chair on the observation deck
shots.narration_beat_text: 관측 데크에서 마지막 감시자가 의자에 몸을 기대고 있습니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; macro close-up: bloodshot eye refusing to blink, alarm-light reflected on the iris
shots.narration_beat_text: 충혈된 눈동자가 떨리지만 끝까지 시선을 놓지 않습니다.

scenes.narration: 문서는 끝났지만 이야기는 안 끝났습니다. 지금도 누군가는 그 석상을 보고 있고, 누군가는 깜빡임을 참지 못하고 있으니까요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; medium shot: night-watch monitor softly cycling through silent feeds
shots.narration_beat_text: 야간 경비 스테이션의 모니터에 조용히 신호가 흐릅니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; over-the-shoulder shot: another observer staring into the distance at the sentinel's silhouette
shots.narration_beat_text: 다른 감시자가 멀리서 석상의 윤곽을 응시합니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; macro close-up: tired eyelid sliding down, freezing just before it fully closes
shots.narration_beat_text: 지친 눈꺼풀이 천천히 내려오기 직전에서 멈춥니다.
